shared_properties: Body footprint remains aligned to the same 32x48 bounds as the idle asset.
Head crest and base torso silhouette remain consistent with the player master asset.
The exposed state still reads as Umbra rather than a separate creature.
differences: Adds exposure-white edge flashes and thin beam cuts across the body silhouette.
The pose curls inward slightly to show danger while staying gameplay-readable.
Frame timing emphasizes a pulsing flicker instead of calm breathing motion.

bevy_constraints.bundle_strategy: Reuse the player SpriteSheetBundle and switch to the exposure atlas while the hitbox overlaps a lit region.
bevy_constraints.asset_loading: Load character/player_umbra_exposure_5f_12fps.png during Loading and bind it to the exposure status state.
runtime_notes: The exposure loop should read clearly while the HUD gauge rises at 20 percent per second.
Keep the torso anchor stable so the collider does not shift when the flashing state activates.
Use frame brightness rhythm to support a looping warning hum without replacing the silhouette-based art direction.

context.usage: Warning state shown whenever the player overlaps a live light beam and begins filling the exposure gauge.

shape.silhouette: Umbra recoils under sharp light, with the outer edge flashing white and thin beam cuts breaking the pure shadow mass.

acceptance_criteria: Sprite sheet is exactly 160x48 px with five 32x48 frames.
Exposure-white flashes are visible in every frame without fully erasing the black silhouette core.
The warning state reads as pain and danger in profile without requiring additional VFX layers.

reference_images.label: gdd_markdown
reference_images.purpose: Grounds puzzle rules, object dimensions, HUD placement, and the Bevy 0.14 technical targets for Umbra Scale.

reference_images.label: moodboard
reference_images.purpose: Grounds the twilight art-deco tower mood, silhouette layering, amber beam contrast, and architectural ornament rhythm.

reference_images.purpose: Grounds Umbra silhouette proportions, eye-glow placement, and cloak-like shadow contours for player and echo scale checks.
